_comment: Manual player→clubs additions for cases where Wikidata is missing statements. Format: playerQid → [clubQids]. Used by /api/round to augment intersection results. When a Wikipedia article documents a player at a club but Wikidata doesn't have the P54 statement yet, add here. When Wikidata catches up you can leave the entry (it just becomes redundant).

Q42303600.name: Edon Zhegrova
Q42303600.note: Lille and Juventus missing from Wikidata as of 2026

Q470669.name: Elvir Bolić
Q470669.note: Was on Real Madrid roster, only played on loan at Rayo Vallecano; Wikidata missing the Real Madrid statement
